description: CompositionGrey hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has drawstrings for the hood, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, two pockets on the front, full zippered placket, distressed graphic print on the chest and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron Do not iron on decorationsA sportswear classic, this sweatshirt from roxy is sure to become an off-duty staple and is a refreshing addition to your sport collection. The thick fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth, the stylish ribbing gives you a strong sporty edge. Layer over long sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
